title: Homophone Hotel
short_description: Check chaotic guests into the room with the right word — put the bear in the BARE room and, well, that's a lawsuit.
description: Welcome to the Homophone Hotel, where every guest's booking hangs on ONE little word. Read the sentence on their luggage and check them into the right room: their or there? to, too or two? bear or bare? Get it wrong and chaos erupts — put the bear in the BARE room and, well, that's a lawsuit. Grade bands ramp from friendly pairs like sea/see and blew/blue, to the classic their/there/they're and your/you're, to grown-up mix-ups like whose/who's and allowed/aloud. A free online homophones and spelling game for kids in grades 2–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the room with the right word before the front-desk bell rings.
